message:
style(test): rustfmt reorder sync:: use-group in proptest_jsonl_roundtrip

Pure rustfmt ordering tweak — move `ExportConfig, ImportConfig` to
the front of the `beads_rust::sync::{...}` use-group so the type
imports come before the function imports. Matches the rustfmt config
in this repo (type-like names first, free functions after). No
import set change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
